description: Required scalar VARIANT writes through Range.Value2, including Empty, Null, Boolean, integral, floating-point, BSTR, error, date, and currency inputs.
Matching scalar VARIANT writes through Range.Value for direct comparison with Value2.
Never-written blank, VT_EMPTY, VT_NULL, empty string, ClearContents, and formula-empty-string states.
OA date serial values read through Value and Value2 with an explicit NumberFormat.
VT_CY zero, positive, negative, and large safe values with an explicit NumberFormat.
Controlled formula-generated Excel error values read through Value, Value2, Formula, and Formula2.
Scalar arithmetic, reference, text, Boolean, error, date, empty-string, and Unicode formulas.
Required 1x1 through 3x4 shapes populated with unique row/column marker values.
Required matching SAFEARRAY(VARIANT) shapes with marker-value round trips.
IEEE-754 exact-integer boundaries, integer limits, decimal precision, small values, large finite value, and negative zero.
Whitespace, control, embedded-NUL, Unicode, formula-like, apostrophe, and Excel cell-length BSTR cases.
A 3x3 SAFEARRAY(VARIANT) containing Empty, Null, Boolean, number, string, error, date, and currency elements.
Formula2 SEQUENCE capability and spill-range Value2 observation.
